name: senna-hungry-eyes
prompt: Extreme close-up on eyes. Lidded green bedroom eyes with long lashes, narrowing with frustrated hunger. Predatory intensity. Warm amber lighting reflecting in irises. Dark radiating lines behind — desire visible as pressure. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: You can't stay frozen forever, Rei. Eventually you'll want to feel something.

name: rei-lie
prompt: Medium close-up. Silver-haired woman, face perfectly neutral, ice-blue eyes cold and distant. Voice like ice. Academy uniform pristine. Cold blue lighting from left casting sharp shadows. Composure as armor. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: senna-sharp-smile
prompt: Close-up on face. Red-haired woman with sharp knowing smile, green eyes narrowed with confidence. Challenging expression. Warm lighting, dark background. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
